arts.ttl: Arsenal & Chelsea target Isak - Friday's gossip
arts.sum: Chelsea and Arsenal keen on Newcastle's Alexander Isak, Manchester United briefed on Alphonso Davies contract situation at Bayern Munich, Graham Potter sounded out by Wolves and West Ham.

arts.ttl: Mixed emotions for Slot after Liverpool draw at Newcastle
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot admits he has mixed emotions after coming from behind to lead Newcastle, before conceding a late equaliser in a hugely entertaining game at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: 'Best game of season' - Newcastle give Liverpool rivals hope
arts.sum: Liverpool's 3-3 draw at Newcastle is described as "one of the best games of the season" - and gives their rivals hope in the battle for the Premier League title.

arts.ttl: Amazon Prime issues apology to Liverpool boss Arne Slot - after broadcaster wrongly implied Dutchman went into referee's office at half-time of dramatic draw with Newcastle
arts.sum: Slot was left frustrated at half-time with his side a goal down and three men having been booked, and Walker implied after the match that the Dutchman had darted into Andy Madley's office.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe reveals real Celtic snub reason as Newcastle boss blasts pundit for 'jumping to conclusions' in 'bottled' quip
arts.sum: Celtic obviously thought quite highly of you and if you look at what they said at the time, they were, it looked like, alighting upon you for a big job. Eddie Howe's proposed move to Celtic back in 2021 seems like a lifetime ago, with both the Hoops and Howe performing well in the aftermath of the broken-down deal - but it was a talking for Simon Jordan, who grilled the Newcastle boss over his ambition.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe blasts back at Celtic 'bottled it' accusation as he puts Simon Jordan straight on what REALLY happened
arts.sum: Howe hit back at an accusation he'd 'bottled' the chance to manage Celtic

arts.ttl: Robbie Fowler tells Liverpool what to do with Mohamed Salah immediately after watching his display vs Newcastle
arts.sum: Liverpool remain in pole position at the top of the Premier League table, though they suffered a setback on Wednesday night. The Reds dropped points...

arts.ttl: Stirring Newcastle United display left me proud, angry and asking many questions
arts.sum: Puzzled Geordies must be wondering if United's big-time performers only stir themselves when playing the London Palladium. Another stirring performance because the Londoners are the in-form home side of the PL and therefore worthy of challenge or another lacklustre performance as at Palace because we play the badge and not the side?

arts.ttl: Newcastle United hit out at PSR rules as 'really uncomfortable' admission made
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has admitted that he felt 'really uncomfortable' after Newcastle United were 'forced' to sell Elliot Anderson and Yankuba Minteh to comply with PSR rules last summer. "I felt really uncomfortable in the summer when we were forced to make two sales of two really talented young players against our will for financial reasons," Howe told Up Front .

arts.ttl: Newcastle United owners PIF expanding football empire as six deals struck and one more imminent
